title: StripeToddlerKVLayout
description: JSON Schemas and key layout models for Cloudflare KV namespaces in the Stripe Toddler application.

namespaces.name: STRIPE_TODDLER_INVENTORY
namespaces.description: Stores meta-information for inventory items cached at the edge, keyed by barcode. Also stores App Attest registered device public keys.

keys.description: Details of an inventory item linked to a specific barcode.

access_patterns.read: GET /api/pos/inventory/{barcode} -> O(1) latency lookup from edge worker.
access_patterns.write: POST /api/admin/inventory -> Saved by admin web portal.

barcode.description: Barcode identifier scanned via Bluetooth keyboard wedge.

name.description: Item description shown to the toddler (e.g. 'Red Fire Engine Truck').

price_cents.description: Integer dollar price in cents (e.g. 500 = $5). Toddler items default to clean, integer dollar amounts.

image_url.description: Public URL pointing to R2-hosted photo asset.

keys.description: App Attest security validation record for verified iPad hardware.

access_patterns.read: Validating X-App-Attest-Assertion header payload signatures on incoming POS requests.
access_patterns.write: POST /api/attest/verify -> Registers a new device key ID during app configuration.

device_id.description: Unique UUID assigned to the app installation.

key_id.description: Base64-encoded key credential generated by Apple's secure enclave.

last_counter_value.description: Monotonically increasing counter value passed in assertions to prevent replay signature injection.
